overview.short: Koulutla Chennakesava Temple is located in a reserved forest of Kappatralla, Devanakonda mandal 50 km from Kurnool District headquarters.
overview.description: Koulutla Chennakesava Temple is located in a reserved forest of Kappatralla, Devanakonda mandal 50 km from Kurnool District headquarters. The great Vijayanagara King, Sri Krishna Deva Raya, constructed a temple complex for the deity. Along with Koulutla Chennakesava Temple there are additional Shiva temples in this shrine.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Koulutla Chenna Kesava Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Koulutla Chenna Kesava Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Koulutla Chenna Kesava Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kurnool Airport (75 km) and the nearest railway station is Kacheguda (Hyderabad) (208 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Koulutla Chenna Kesava Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Koulutla Chenna Kesava Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Koulutla Chenna Kesava Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Koulutla Chenna Kesava Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Koulutla Chenna Kesava Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Madhavaram, Kurnool.
